pages.raw_text:
The state railroad commission
has just issued a bulletin which
contains important rules for rail-
roads in the handling of passen-
gers and freight. The rules pro-
eide that a record must be kept of
each person or corporation order
ing cars on each division. 1t is be-
lieved that this will do away with
much of the favoritism which has
been shown on the car question
heretofore. Also the railroads
must refund to the lawful holder
of a ticket the price paid for any
unused portion of this ticket if 1t
is presented within GO days of its
expiration. Also Immediately on
receiving news Of an accident In
volving loss of life or property or
serious injury to passengers or
employees the superintendent of
each division must at once notify
the commission at Olympia. Also
all waiting rooms and passenger
cars used in the state must be sup
piled with pure drinking water and
heated and lighted so as TO be COM
Portable for patrons.
